1.title: Time spent executing SQL statements
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(postgres.active_time.count),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:postgres_database }
| fieldsAdd sql:postgres_database_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:postgres_database)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Active backend processes
2.query:
timeseries active = avg(postgres.activity.active),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:postgres_database }
| fieldsAdd sql:postgres_database_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:postgres_database)
| sort arrayAvg(active) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Active waiting backend processes
3.query:
timeseries active_waiting = avg(postgres.activity.active_waiting),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:postgres_database }
| fieldsAdd sql:postgres_database_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:postgres_database)
| sort arrayAvg(active_waiting) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd sql:postgres_database_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:postgres_database)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
